articles.title: New parking permits in South Shore town misspelled ‘parking’
articles.description:
While Hull officials issue corrected versions, parking enforcement tied to the new permits will be paused, police said.

The post New parking permits in South Shore town misspelled ‘parking’ appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Hull officials issued new parking permits with 'parking' misspelled.
Corrected permits are being issued while enforcement is paused.
Residents will not face penalties until corrected permits are distributed.

articles.title: The last Boston Market in Mass. has closed. What happened to the once-beloved chicken chain?
articles.description:
The food came fast, yet it didn’t feel like fast food; Boston Market managed to feel like a home-cooked meal.

The post The last Boston Market in Mass. has closed. What happened to the once-beloved chicken chain? appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Boston Market's last location in Massachusetts closed permanently on May 15, 2026.
The chain was known for its home-cooked meal feel and fast service.
Local residents lose a popular dining option, impacting community meal choices.

articles.title: Chargers troll Patriots over Mike Vrabel, Dianna Russini, and more in schedule release video
articles.description:
The Chargers landed shots against Vrabel, Stefon Diggs, Cardi B, and the Patriots' Super Bowl loss in their Halo-themed video.

The post Chargers troll Patriots over Mike Vrabel, Dianna Russini, and more in schedule release video appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Chargers released a Halo-themed video mocking the Patriots and Mike Vrabel.
The video referenced the Patriots' Super Bowl loss, impacting local fan sentiment.
Boston residents may feel heightened rivalry as Chargers target local sports figures.

articles.title: Ask the remodeler: How universal design can help homeowners age in place
articles.description:
It creates a home that is safe and accessible to someone who is elderly, disabled, or recovering from an injury or surgery

The post Ask the remodeler: How universal design can help homeowners age in place appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Universal design enhances safety and accessibility for elderly Boston homeowners.
Home modifications can support seniors recovering from injuries or surgeries.
Increased accessibility promotes independence for Boston residents aging in place.
